name: Irish Potato Candy (with Potatoes)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Katherine Seraphic/Pittsburgh P.G.
Combine mashed potatoes and vanilla. Gradually add the confectioners' sugar, one cup at a time, until a stiff, non-sticky dough forms. (Dried potatoes from baked potatoes tend to be drier than those from boiled potatoes; leftovers are typically drier than fresh ones.)
Using about 1 teaspoon of the mixture for each candy, shape into small irregular spheres resembling new potatoes. Place on wax paper.
Sprinkle with ground cinnamon and store in a cool place or refrigerate. Makes approximately 3 dozen candies.
